name: pressure_fed_lox_kerosene_demo
description: Pressure-fed liquid rocket feed system: a nitrogen (GN2) pressurant bottle regulates ullage pressure into a LOX tank and a kerosene tank, which feed a rocket engine block. Verify the system simulates cleanly, propellant flows, and the engine reaches a usable chamber pressure.

checks.description: Simulation runs without invalid-config or solver crash.
Node telemetry recorded for every component.
Propellant actually flows from tanks to engine.
Engine reaches a usable chamber pressure (>= 1.2 MPa).
